data.title: Golden Triangle Ventures (OTC: GTVH) is experiencing a turnaround with cleanup nearing completion, balance sheet strengthening, and core businesses accelerating towards 2026 expansion.
data.description: Austin, TX - On January 13, 2026, Golden Triangle Ventures (OTC: GTVH) released a corporate update indicating a strategic transition into its next phase. The company is nearing completion of the final tasks related to legacy cleanup efforts while also bolstering its financial standing. Moreover, they are ramping up activities within their key operational sectors to enhance growth opportunities.

data.title: Helio Corporation is aiming to lead the Space-Based Solar Power market amidst increasing global focus.
data.description: Helio Corporation is positioning itself to lead the emerging space-based solar power market. Recent media coverage has focused on startups proposing orbital data centers powered by space-based solar energy for niche applications. However, Helio emphasizes the larger opportunity of delivering continuous, reliable, clean energy from space to Earth at utility scale. The company believes that as discussions about orbital energy infrastructure increase, a competitive race for commercial leadership in space-based solar power is emerging. Helio believes it is uniquely positioned to win that race.

data.title: XTL Biopharmaceuticals buys 85% of NeuroNOS to tap into autism market with top scientific leaders, including two Nobel Laureates.
data.description: Renowned autism researcher Prof. Haitham Amal, along with two Nobel Laureates, have teamed up, bringing unmatched scientific expertise to their research efforts. With the collaboration, they aim to further advance autism research on a global scale, leveraging the combined knowledge and experience of the eminent individuals. This collaboration marks a significant milestone in the field of autism research, promising groundbreaking discoveries and insights.

data.title: Performance Shipping Inc. placed successful USD 50M tap issue for senior secured bond, total now $150M with 9.875% coupon.
data.description: ATHENS, Greece - On January 13, 2026, Performance Shipping Inc. (NASDAQ: PSHG) revealed that they successfully completed a tap issue for their senior secured bond due July 17, 2029, with ISIN: NO0013607028, adding USD 50 million to their existing bond. The total outstanding amount under the Bonds has now reached USD 150 million. This tap issue, with a fixed coupon of 9.875% per annum, payable semi-annually, was priced at 103.00% of par value. Initiated by a reverse inquiry, the tap issue is set to conclude on January 26, 2026, subject to customary closing conditions. The net proceeds from this action will be utilized for general corporate purposes as outlined in the terms of the Bonds.

data.title: Warren questions SEC on Trump's crypto in 401(k) plans, citing family's $1.2B crypto gain; sees conflict of interest.
data.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren is demanding answers from SEC Chair Paul Atkins on how the agency will protect retirement savers following President Trump's approval for crypto in 401(k) plans. Warren raised concerns that Trump's family has made $1.2 billion from crypto ventures since he took office. She sent a letter to Atkins warning that the current draft of the crypto market legislation being negotiated by the Senate Banking Committee could weaken SEC authority and expose 401(k) plans to volatile crypto assets. Trump's sudden support for crypto is believed to be motivated by his financial interests. The letter precedes a committee markup on the crypto bill scheduled for Thursday. Warren also cautioned that the proposed legislation could create a "tokenization loophole" enabling blockchain-based financial products to bypass SEC regulations.

data.title: ECD Automotive Design launches Heritage Product Line for Defender 90 and 110, celebrating the Defender's origins.
data.description: The Heritage line of Defender vehicles is now offered in both Defender 90 and Defender 110 versions. This special line pays tribute to the origins of the Defender model.

data.title: Seal Security partners with Wiz, joining WIN to deliver secure container base images for vulnerability remediation.
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel on January 13, 2026, Seal Security has revealed its collaboration with top cloud security provider Wiz and is now a member of the Wiz Integration Network (WIN). This partnership bolsters WIN with Seal Security's robust base images, emphasizing the importance of cybersecurity.

data.title: Brent Reynolds named President for Master-Planned Communities in the South Region by FirstService Residential. In Florida, Georgia, Tennessee.
data.description: A recent announcement states that a new position has been created to enhance growth and operational efficiency for the company's growing large-scale, master-planned lifestyle collection in Florida, Georgia, and Tennessee. The company in question, based in Plantation, Florida, disclosed this move on January 13, 2026. FirstService Residential, recognized as a top property management firm in North America, is taking strategic steps to bolster its presence and services in these key states.

data.title: DECKED unveils a new durable, customizable, theft-proof truck bed tool box, joining its Drawer System and CargoGlide as ultimate truck storage systems.
data.description: Based in Ketchum, Idaho, DECKED, a top provider of truck bed organization solutions, has unveiled its latest product - the Tool Box. This new addition complements DECKED's existing Drawer System and CargoGlide, becoming the ultimate trio of truck storage systems in the market. The Tool Box has been completely reimagined from the ground up to offer enhanced durability, functionality, and protection against theft and weather conditions, surpassing other tool boxes available for truck beds. As DECKED's latest innovation, the Tool Box is set to revolutionize the industry. Customers can soon purchase this cutting-edge product to optimize their truck bed storage solutions.

data.title: AlphaTheta introduces first apparel collection titled "ONE THROUGH MUSIC," inspired by universal language. Launches 2-part line.
data.description: AlphaTheta has introduced its inaugural apparel collection, consisting of two parts, which draws inspiration from the brand's motto of "One Through Music." The collection features a range of seasonal clothing and everyday essentials. Set in Tokyo, the announcement was made on January 13, 2026. The press kit for the collection can be accessed via the provided link.

data.title: Global central bankers unite to back Jerome Powell's Fed independence amidst U.S. investigation. Key supporters include European Central Bank President, 12 other heads; urge for monetary policy separation from politics.
data.description: Top central bankers from various countries across Europe and Asia have expressed strong support for Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell amidst increased scrutiny from the U.S. Justice Department over his congressional testimony. A coalition of influential central bankers released a joint statement on Tuesday in solidarity with Powell, emphasizing the importance of maintaining monetary independence to uphold global financial stability. European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde, speaking on behalf of twelve central banks, including the Bank of England's Governor Andrew Bailey and the Reserve Bank of Australia's Governor Michele Bullock, voiced their support for Powell. The statement also highlighted concerns about political interference in monetary policy and its potential impact on both U.S. credibility and the stability of the global financial system.

data.title: Rich Bursek of Certuity announces expansion with three strategic Managing Director appointments in Q4 2025.
data.description: In January 13, 2026, in North Palm Beach, Florida, Rich Bursek, the President and Partner of Certuity, disclosed the expansion of the multi-family office's leadership team and national presence in the last quarter of 2025. Three key Managing Director positions were filled strategically, contributing to the growth and breadth of the organization.
